description: You are a digital forensics analyst working on a case involving a wiped USB drive. A raw binary dump of the drive is located at `data/evidence.bin`. The filesystem is corrupted, but the drive contains hidden evidence in the form of JPEG and PNG images. Implement the `carve` method in `forensics/carver.py` within the PyCharm project at `/home/ga/PycharmProjects/file_carver` to scan the binary data and extract valid image files. Your implementation must pass the unit tests in `tests/test_carver.py`. Extract all recovered images from `data/evidence.bin` into the `recovered_files/` directory.
